name: Tormod Backed Cane Dining Chair - Threshold™
description:
Add polished elegance to your eating nook with the Tormod Cane-Backed Dining Chair from Threshold™. This armless dining chair features an open-weave rattan design creating the high back and curved seat for breezy, artistic flair. The black wooden chair is supported on square, tapered legs with a trestle base for added stability, and it's is casual enough for your kitchen but can easily go in a more formal dining room setting. Plus, this rattan dining chair is also lightweight enough to be moved around with ease when you need to rearrange seating.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
